summaries.apiASubmitTransport: API A accepted a bounded submit over the target environment API.
summaries.workerLease: One worker acquired a bounded lease and duplicate active lease was blocked.
summaries.progressPersistence: Durable progress rows were observed with bounded sequence metadata.
summaries.apiBDurableStatusReadback: API B read the durable task status without API A process memory.
summaries.apiBPollingReplay: API B replayed durable progress events after a sequence cursor.
summaries.apiBDurablePolling: API B read durable status and replayed progress after a cursor.
summaries.ownerHiddenStatus: Cross-owner status read returned hidden not-found.
summaries.ownerHiddenPolling: Cross-owner polling read returned hidden not-found.
summaries.retryFailureSafety: Retry cap and terminal failure behavior were summarized with safe reason codes.
summaries.leaseExpiryRecovery: A second worker reclaimed the task after lease expiry.
summaries.staleWorkerWriteRejection: The stale worker could not write terminal state after reclaim.
summaries.ownerIsolation: Cross-owner status and polling reads returned hidden not-found responses.
summaries.sanitizedFailureOutput: Failure output contained only safe reason codes and no traceback text.
summaries.sseLimitation: Process-local SSE limitation remained recorded; durable polling was the baseline.
summaries.reviewNotes: Sanitized target-environment evidence is present but remains pending manual review.

manualReview.rollbackOrDegradedNote: Rollback to single API process remains documented if target topology degrades.
